zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Heath於大約1360年出生在英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾時，他的父親John Hethe26歲，母親Amy de Risby27歲。他於1380年與Elizabeth de Mountford在英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年3月1日在他的家鄉享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Heath于大约1360年出生在英国素福爾可米爾登哈爾时，他的父亲John Hethe26岁，母亲Amy de Risby27岁。他于1380年与Elizabeth de Mountford在英国素福爾可米爾登哈爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年3月1日在他的家乡享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heath
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(on the) heath’ (Middle English he(a)th, Old English hǣth) or else a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word. The same word also denoted heather, the characteristic plant of heathland areas. This surname has also been established in Dublin, Ireland, since the late 16th century.

variants.name: Haith
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): variant of   Heath  .

variants.name: Heathman
meanings: English: topographic name denoting a dweller ‘on the heath’, from Middle English he(a)th + man(ne). Compare Heath and Heather .

variants.name: Hatton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hatton (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Middlesex, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Warwickshire), Hatton Hall (Cheshire), or Cold and High Hatton (Shropshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Heath .
English: variant of Atton with prosthetic H-, a topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)). Compare Towne .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chatáin, a patronymic from a personal name meaning ‘servant of (Saint) Catan’; see McHatton .

variants.name: Heather
meanings: English: topographic name denoting a ‘dweller on the heath’, an agent derivative of Middle English hethe; compare Heath . The name may also be habitational name from Heather (Leicestershire), from Old English hǣthor ‘heathland’ (hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + the noun suffix -or) or hǣddre ‘heather’. This surname is widespread in southern England, and also established in Ireland.

variants.name: Health
meanings: Altered form of English and Scottish   Heath  .
English and Scottish: perhaps a nickname from the vocabulary word health. — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is 105.

variants.name: Hoad
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, from Middle English hoth ‘heath’ (Old English hāth, a byform of Old English hǣth), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Hoath in Kent. This form was restricted in the Middle Ages to southeastern England, and the surname is still largely confined to Kent, Surrey, and Sussex. Compare Heath .

variants.name: Heid
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Eckhart, Gerd, Gotthilf, Heinz, Klaus, Konrad, Kurt, Manfred, Ralf, Uli.
German, Swiss German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name from Middle High German heide, German Heide ‘heath, moor, open, uncultivated land’. Compare Heath .
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Haido, a short form of any of various compound names beginning with haid ‘heath’ (i.e. wasteland, often with heather).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Heath was born about 1360, in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, his father, John Hethe, was 26 and his mother, Amy de Risby, was 27. He married Elizabeth de Mountford in 1380, in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 1 March 1440, in his hometown, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Heath est né environ 1360, à Mildenhall, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Hethe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Amy de Risby, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Mountford en 1380, à Mildenhall, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 1 mars 1440, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Heath um 1360 in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hethe 26 und seine Mutter Amy de Risby 27. Er hat 1380 in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England Elizabeth de Mountford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 1. März 1440 im Alter von 81 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Heath è nato il circa 1360 nel Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Hethe, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Amy de Risby, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Mountford nel 1380, nel Mildenhall, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 marzo 1440, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Heath(이)가 대략 1360년 영국 수폴크 미데홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hethe(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Amy de Risby(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1380년 영국 수폴크 미데홀에서 Elizabeth de Mountford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 3월 1일 그의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Heath nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hethe, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Amy de Risby, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Mountford em 1380, em Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de março de 1440, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Heath родился около 1360 г. в местности маилденолл, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Hethe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Amy de Risby, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Mountford в 1380 г. в местности маилденолл, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 1 марта 1440 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Heath nació aproximadamente 1360, en Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hethe, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Amy de Risby, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Mountford en 1380, en Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de marzo de 1440, en su pueblo, a la edad de 81 años.
